rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GIOVANNI PEDRONCINI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. issues for hearing are as follows: amount the PR owes the estate, stated as either $1,911.43 or $1,767.31; whether she also owes the estate for the $500 love seat she is keeping; time records filed in support of payments from escrow; payment request to Ms. Shields; request for additional fees for PR when statutory fees are over $15,000 and she states the total time spent was less than 200 hours.
